prompt: Add a ToastService that shows brief notifications, intended to be used by one component. Wire it into DI and show a component using it. Just the service skeleton, provider wiring, and the usage.
Add a standalone ProductsList component that fetches a paged list of products from a typed HTTP service and renders it, handling loading and error states. Include a spec.
I have an htmlSnippet string field that comes from a backend API and I want to render it inside a div. Show the cleanest way to do this in Angular.
